---
title: "Betsy Comely"
---

## Betsy Comely

### Description

blacksmith

### Biography

An inhabitant of Otterbourne in 1838;  possibly the Elizabeth Comely who died Winchester Jan-Mar 1850. [Register of deaths]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 22 [1897]
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
